scripts.dev: MODE=dev BACKEND_PORT=3001 bun run scripts/kill-port.ts 3001 && bun run scripts/kill-port.ts 5173 && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run --filter _backend --elide-lines=0 dev" "bun run --filter _frontend --elide-lines=0 dev"
scripts.prod: bun run scripts/kill-port.ts 3002 && DATA_DIR=../data/prod bun run scripts/build-prod.ts && bun run scripts/run-prod.ts
scripts.build:all: DATA_DIR=../data/prod PACKAGE_DIR=../data/package bun run scripts/build-prod.ts --target=bun-linux-x64-modern && DATA_DIR=../data/prod PACKAGE_DIR=../data/package bun run scripts/build-prod.ts --target=bun-linux-arm64 && DATA_DIR=../data/prod PACKAGE_DIR=../data/package bun run scripts/build-prod.ts --target=bun-windows-x64-modern && DATA_DIR=../data/prod PACKAGE_DIR=../data/package bun run scripts/build-prod.ts --target=bun-windows-arm64
